message:
test(robot): adopt actual JSON insertion order in capabilities golden (u9osp)

The initial hand-written golden assumed serde_json::to_string_pretty would
emit keys in alphabetical order. Actual behavior preserves insertion order
(crate_version → api_version → contract_version → features → connectors →
limits), matching what run_capabilities constructs. Regenerated the golden
from a local cargo test run; the test now passes.

Closes follow-up on coding_agent_session_search-u9osp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
